name: mini-built-app-fixture
description: Phase G E2 fixture for end-to-end browser-loop coverage. Not a real MVP Builder workspace; only contains the files runBrowserLoop needs (RUNTIME_TARGET.md, SAMPLE_DATA.md, requirements/ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA.md, phases/phase-01/PLAYWRIGHT_FLOWS/*.json) plus a vanilla http server. Used by scripts/test-browser-loop-fixture.ts.
